zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Thompson於1468年11月出生在英國時，他的父親John Thompson22歲，母親Elizabeth Vaughn23歲。他於1510年6月與Mary Bruce結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1559年5月19日在英國波藍德利特享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德利特。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Thompson was born in November 1468, in England, his father, John Thompson, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Vaughn, was 23. He married Mary Bruce in June 1510. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 19 May 1559, in Penrith, Cumberland, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Thompson est né en novembre 1468, à Angleterre, son père, John Thompson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vaughn, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bruce en juin 1510. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1559, à Penrith, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Penrith, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Thompson im November 1468 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thompson 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Vaughn 23. Er hat im Juni 1510 Mary Bruce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 19. Mai 1559 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Penrith, Cumberland, England und wurde in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Thompson è nato il nel novembre 1468 nel England, il suo padre, John Thompson, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Vaughn, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bruce nel giugno 1510. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 19 maggio 1559, nel Penrith, Cumberland, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Penrith, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Thompsonが1468年11月にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Thompsonは22歳，母Elizabeth Vaughnは23歳であった。1510年6月にMary Bruceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1559年5月19日にイギリスクウンバーランドペンリスで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドペンリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Thompson(이)가 1468년 11월 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thompson(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Vaughn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1510년 6월 Mary Bruce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1559년 5월 19일 영국 c벌랜드 펜리스에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 펜리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Thompson nasceu em novembro de 1468, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thompson, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Vaughn, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bruce em junho de 1510. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1559, em Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Thompson родился ноябрь 1468 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Thompson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vaughn, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bruce июнь 1510 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 19 мая 1559 г. в местности пенрит, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности пенрит, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Thompson nació en noviembre de 1468, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Thompson, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Vaughn, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mary Bruce en junio de 1510. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1559, en Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
